Index: backend/app.py
===================================================================
--- backend/app.py	
+++ backend/app.py	
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+from flask import Flask, send_file, render_template, send_from_directory
+import os
+
+app = Flask(__name__, template_folder='../frontend')
+
+@app.route('/')
+def index():
+    return render_template('index.html')
+
+@app.route('/download')
+def download_installer():
+    path = "path/to/installer"
+    return send_file(path, as_attachment=True)
+
+@app.route('/styles/<path:filename>')
+def styles(filename):
+    return send_from_directory('../frontend/styles', filename)
+
+@app.route('/teste')
+def teste():
+    return {"status": "ok", "mensagem": "rota de teste funcionando"}
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    app.run(debug=True)
